goal.summary: Continue P1 Tau hardening by wiring typed evidence manifests into project DAG pre-dispatch gates.

commands_run.command: uv run ruff check --select F,I src/tau_coding/project_dag.py tests/test_project_dag.py
uv run pytest tests/test_project_dag.py tests/test_evidence_manifest.py tests/test_generic_dag.py tests/test_generic_provider_adapter.py -q

commands_run.result: No whitespace errors reported for tracked diffs

what_changed: Added optional evidence_manifest path support to tau.dag_contract.v1 parsing.
When evidence_manifest is present, Tau validates it before dispatch with tau.evidence_validation_receipt.v1.
Tau blocks before dispatch if the manifest is invalid or does not cover every DAG-level required_evidence kind.
Blocked manifest gates are packaged as tau.dag_error.v1 course-correction payloads and execute no node commands.
proves: A valid evidence_manifest covering creator_artifact and reviewer_verdict allows the local creator/reviewer DAG to dispatch.
A manifest missing a DAG-level required_evidence kind blocks before dispatch with evidence_manifest_missing_required_evidence.
A manifest with a sha256 mismatch blocks before dispatch with evidence_manifest_invalid.
The focused project DAG, evidence manifest, generic DAG, and generic provider adapter tests pass together.
does_not_prove: Live Herdr pane or provider execution.
GitHub mutation, Memory sync, browser UI proof, or full WebGPT roadmap completion.
That every existing DAG contract in the repository declares an evidence_manifest.

next_recommended_route.reason: Continue P1 with command-spec trust policy or Herdr workspace lease/state-machine hardening.
